fields.name: link
fields.label: Link
fields.description: Used when "Link to a Post" below is left empty — for external links or in-page anchors like #services.

fields.name: postReference
fields.label: Link to a Post
fields.description: Optional — pick a News article to link to instead of the manual Link above. Takes precedence over Link when set.

fields.name: sectionHeading
fields.label: Services Section Heading
fields.description: Heading for the scrolling brand showcase (Home Page only).

fields.name: items
fields.label: Affiliate Companies
fields.description: Which companies appear in this section, and in what order. Edit a company's logo, text, and links in the Affiliate Companies collection.

fields.name: postReference
fields.label: News Article
fields.description: Pick a News article to pull its date/category/title/excerpt/image/link from automatically. Any field filled in manually below overrides that article's value.

fields.name: url
fields.label: URL
fields.description: The page's live URL path, without a leading slash (e.g. "thanks" for /thanks).

fields.name: link
fields.label: Link
fields.description: Used when "Link to a Post" below is left empty — for external links or in-page anchors like #services.

fields.name: postReference
fields.label: Link to a Post
fields.description: Optional — pick a News article to link to instead of the manual Link above. Takes precedence over Link when set.

fields.name: sectionHeading
fields.label: Services Section Heading
fields.description: Heading for the scrolling brand showcase (Home Page only).

fields.name: items
fields.label: Affiliate Companies
fields.description: Which companies appear in this section, and in what order. Edit a company's logo, text, and links in the Affiliate Companies collection.

fields.name: postReference
fields.label: News Article
fields.description: Pick a News article to pull its date/category/title/excerpt/image/link from automatically. Any field filled in manually below overrides that article's value.

defaultItem.title: Contact Us
defaultItem.formDescription: Send us a message and we will get back to you shortly.

filename.description: The file name becomes the article's web address: /insights/<file-name>

fields.name: affiliate
fields.label: Team Group
fields.description: Which About-page tab this person appears under.

fields.name: miniBioEnabled
fields.label: Mini bio enabled
fields.description: Show a 'Mini bio' link on this card. Leave off until a bio has been written.

fields.name: profilePageEnabled
fields.label: Dedicated profile page
fields.description: Publish a /team/{slug} page for this person. The View Profile card link will route there instead of LinkedIn.

fields.name: title
fields.label: Card Title
fields.description: First line on the brand card, e.g. "Commercial Real Estate".

fields.name: subtitle
fields.label: Card Subtitle
fields.description: Second line on the brand card, e.g. "Debt Products".

fields.name: slug
fields.label: Slug
fields.description: Must match this entry's file name; used to group team members into About-page tabs.

fields.name: footerNavExtras
fields.label: Footer Company Links (extras, below main nav)

fields.name: openCookieSettings
fields.label: Opens cookie settings (instead of linking)
fields.description: If checked, clicking this link reopens the cookie consent banner instead of navigating to the URL above.

description.value: References another document, used as a foreign key
